_comment: Synthetic contact: LOW confidence, differential_insufficient true (Champion/Influencer ambiguous — Champion 45, Influencer 38, differential 7 < minimum 10). expected_classification._note: Verified against services/scoring-engine/classifier.py classify_visitor() with signal_observations timestamps resolved to timestamp_days_ago before now (UTC), all within the last_90_days decay window (1.0x multiplier). upgrade_path._comment: Same contact, subsequent session. Contact B responds to progressive disclosure and self-identifies as Champion. This is the demo's central before/after moment — not a separate contact record.
